heading: Repealed. , , 86June 26, 1953, ch. 157, § 267 Stat. 85
label: 343a to 343c–1 Repealed. , , 86June 26, 1953, ch. 157, § 267 Stat. 85
notes: Section 343a, acts , ; , , authorized additional annual appropriations of $980,000, and $500,000, further to develop cooperative agricultural extension work under sections 341 to 343, 344 to 346, and 347a to 349 of this title, provided for the disposition of such sums, and extended the system to Hawaii.May 22, 1928, ch. 687, § 145 Stat. 711Mar. 10, 1930, ch. 7346 Stat. 83

Section 343b, , , provided that the sums appropriated under said section 343a should be in addition to sums appropriated under , or sums otherwise annually appropriated for cooperative agricultural extension work.act May 22, 1928, ch. 687, § 245 Stat. 712section 343 of this title

Section 343c, acts , title II, § 21, ; , , authorized further additional appropriations on an ascending scale until they amounted to $12,000,000 annually, further to develop the cooperative agricultural system inaugurated under sections 341 to 343, 344 to 346, 347a to 349 of this title, and provided for their disposition.June 29, 1935, ch. 33849 Stat. 438June 6, 1945, ch. 175, § 259 Stat. 233

Section 343c–1, acts , ; , title VII, § 707, , authorized additional appropriations of $555,000 annually, for the purpose of paying the expenses of cooperative extension work in agriculture and home economics, and provided for their disposition.Apr. 24, 1939, ch. 8553 Stat. 589Sept. 21, 1944, ch. 41258 Stat. 742
The provisions that were contained in all of the above repealed sections are covered generally by sections 341 to 343, 344 to 346, and 347a to 349 of this title.
